## 🧪 How to test locally

### Setup

    git fetch --all --prune
    git checkout <branch>
    pnpm i

### Run

    pnpm dev
    # (optional) pnpm lint
    # (optional) pnpm test
    # (optional) pnpm build

### Manual checklist

- [ ] Feature works as expected
- [ ] No visual regressions
- [ ] Mobile responsive
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Accessibility OK (focus + reduced motion)
